title: channels-bridge runtime options
description: Options for the channels-bridge runtime provider

agent_provider.description: Runtime provider path for the agent to spawn as child process

user_base_image_stage.description: Path to user's Dockerfile (relative to agent folder). Used as base stage in 3-stage build.

channels.description: List of channel providers to enable

options.description: Channel-specific options. Validated by the channel provider's own schema.json.
